name: Walk The World Pixel Icon v1
canvas_size: 512x512 source then downscale to in-game icon size
perspective: centered isolated object icon with slight 3/4 view only when helpful
palette_rule: colorful but controlled palette readable at small size
rarity_visual_rule: common is simple rare has richer accents epic has subtle glow legendary has dramatic aura
negative_prompt: no text no UI no characters no complex scene no watermark no photorealism
master_style_prompt: Create a single game-ready inventory icon for Walk The World in polished retro pixel art. Keep one centered object, crisp silhouette, readable at tiny sizes, and cohesive style with existing world art.
